specs.title: 8 ΓÇö Scan & Merge button is absent from DOM when no files queued
9, 10, 11 ΓÇö processing shows Receipt, no PREMIUM text on download, reset works
12 ΓÇö credits decrement after processing a file that triggers Phase 2
13 ΓÇö PricingModal opens when credits are exhausted
14 ΓÇö PricingModal closes on Escape key
15 ΓÇö PricingModal has correct ARIA attributes
16 ΓÇö theme toggle switches data-theme on <html>
17 ΓÇö light mode text is not transparent
